articles.title: New York Harbor whale strike sinks fire rescue boat after July 4 celebrations

articles.title: Media attacks Donald Trump's Fourth of July celebration claiming it 'sullied' America 250

articles.title: ESPN writer hates Team USA getting Folarin Balogun back, says any World Cup success is now 'tainted'

articles.title: Here's the unique, little-known rule that FIFA used to overturn Folarin Balogun red card suspension
articles.summary: FIFA used an arcane rule to overturn Folarin Balogun's red card suspension, allowing him to face Belgium despite there being no appeal process.

articles.title: England player injures wrist hopping over ad board during team's World Cup victory celebration vs Mexico

articles.title: The numbers don’t lie. Young Americans are falling in love … with socialism

articles.title: Tennis great Raphael Nadal swears by breakfast with nutrient-packed tiny fish

articles.title: King Charles hopes to reunite with Prince Harry, but Queen Camilla is drawing one firm line: experts
articles.summary: Royal experts say Queen Camilla supports King Charles in his efforts to reunite with Prince Harry but plans to keep her distance during the Sussex visit.

articles.title: STEVE FORBES: Chuck Schumer has a beef with beef, but doesn’t even know how to grill it

articles.summary: Global disruptions from the Russia Ukraine war and Middle East tensions are squeezing fertilizer supply chains, driving up food prices for Americans.

articles.title: GINGRICH, JINDAL: Seniors deserve to age at home without scams draining Medicare dollars

articles.summary: Jude Bellingham struck twice in two minutes and Harry Kane buried a penalty as England beat Mexico 3-2 at Estadio Azteca despite a red card.

articles.summary: The outbreak is centered around several Upper East Side ZIP codes, with health officials warning residents and recent visitors to seek care quickly if they develop flu-like symptoms.

articles.title: Six Kurdish fighters killed in IRGC ambush as clashes spread across western Iran
